name: Pharsa
intro: Pharsa, the Wings of Vengeance, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Verri.

abilities.name: Spiritual Unity
abilities.description: Damage Slow Every 8 seconds, Verri enters the Hunting state and assists Pharsa on her next attack against an enemy hero, dealing 8% extra Magic Damage equal to the target's Max HP (+1% for every 200 Magic Power owned) and slowing them by 60% for 1 second. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Curse of Crow
abilities.description: CC Damage | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Pharsa unleashes a blast of magic at the target location, dealing 300–425 (+120% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and marking them for 4 seconds. Pharsa's subsequent attack against marked enemies will consume the mark and stun them for 1 second. Skill terms Stun Basic level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt some skills. Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Energy Impact
abilities.description: AOE | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Pharsa releases magic energy in the target direction, dealing 525–700 (+145% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Feathered Air Strike
abilities.description: Burst | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Pharsa takes flight for 8 seconds and bombards the target location, dealing (+160% Total Magic Power) to enemies within the area. This skill can be cast up to 4 times within the duration. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Wings by Wings
abilities.description: Morph Speed Up Pharsa turns into mist and wraps herself around Verri, gaining 150% extra Movement Speed (decaying over time) and the ability to fly over terrain. This state lasts up to 5 seconds or until she uses a Basic Attack or skills, or is controlled. Skill terms Ignore Obstacles Buff: Can pass through obstacles. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).
